title: Protocols for Determining the Linear Range for Quantitative Western Blot Detection
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"p9cv","text":"   This collection contains protocols that explains how to use serial dilutions of sample protein to determine the linear ranges of detection for a target and internal loading control, and choose an appropriate amount of sample to load for QWB analysis.
